subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! All the men of the world, both past and present, have ardently hoped and yearned that from the Most High, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله جمیع رجال عالم از قبل و بعد راجی و آمل بوده اند که از حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
